pre_game.message: Hey A, I'm C — nice to meet you. I'm hoping to win enough to take a dream week in Japan; what made you want to join this game?
I’m A — trying to win about $30,000 for a deposit and a couple months’ rent so my family can get into a stable home after being evicted.
I'm really sorry to hear that — that's huge. I hope you get it; I'll play fair and do my best. Want to team up during the game?
Yes — I’d really appreciate that. I need about $30k; let’s be honest, share strategies, and watch each other’s backs.
Absolutely — I’m in. Let’s be honest, share strategies, pair up in rounds, and signal if someone’s tempted to betray so we can watch each other’s backs.
Thank you — I appreciate it. I’m in: let’s pair up, share strategies, and use two quick taps as a betrayal signal; we’ll check in before each round.
Sounds perfect — two quick taps for betrayal. I’ll check in before each round; we’ll pair up and watch each other’s backs.
Perfect — thank you. I’ll watch for the two taps; let’s pair up each round, check in before decisions, and watch each other’s backs.
Got it — two taps it is. We'll check in before each round and stick to the plan. Let’s win this for your family.
Thank you, C — I really appreciate you. We’ll stick to the two taps, check in before each round, and watch each other’s backs. Let’s win this for my family.
Thank you, A — I’ve got your back. We’ll use the two taps, check before each round, and win this for your family.
Thank you, C — I really appreciate it; let’s stick to the two taps, check before each round, and win this for my family.
You’re welcome — I’ve got your back. Two taps, check before each round, and we’ll win this for your family.
Thanks, C — I really appreciate you. I trust we'll stick to the plan; let’s check in before each round and bring this home for my family.
I’ve got you — we’ll stick to the plan, check before each round, use the two taps if needed, and win this for your family.
Thank you — that means a lot. I trust you and I’ll stick to the plan; let’s win this for my family.
Thank you, A — I’ve got your back. We’ll stick to the plan and win this for your family.
Thank you, C — I really appreciate you; let’s stay sharp, check in before each round, and bring this home for my family.
Thanks, A — I appreciate you too; we’ll stay sharp, check before each round, and bring this home for your family.
Thanks, C — I appreciate you. I trust we’ll stick to the plan; let’s bring this home for my family.
I trust you too — we’ll stick to the plan, check before each round, and win this for your family.
